title: Chronic Disease Self Management Programs * African American Community - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Health Care > Chronic Disease Self Management Programs * African American Community 2 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - No Filter African American Community Diabetes Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF NORTH BY NORTHEAST COMMUNITY HEALTH CENTER HEALTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides basic primary care, including women’s health exams such as breast exams and Pap tests, care for chronic conditions like high blood pressure and diabetes, treatment for minor illnesses and injuries, and immunizations. Does not provide care for medical emergencies. 714 NE Alberta Street Portland, OR 97211 Eligibility: Ages 18-64 who have Oregon Health Plan (OHP) with a primary focus on African American community Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm by appointment only Email (503) 287-4932 Get Directions Visit Website More Details URBAN LEAGUE OF PORTLAND COMMUNITY HEALTH Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Trains and employs members of the Black community to help navigate complex healthcare systems, connect people to health insurance, manage and prevent chronic disease, and provide peer-delivered services for those in recovery. Builds individual and community capability by increasing health knowledge, empowering participants to advocate for themselves, and encouraging them to speak up and ask for what they need to make the best decisions about their health 3934 NE Martin Luther King Jr Boulevard Portland, OR 97212 Eligibility: Unrestricted, with a focus on the African American community Hours: Hours vary Email (503) 280-2600 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NORTH BY NORTHEAST COMMUNITY HEALTH CENTER HEALTH SERVICES URBAN LEAGUE OF PORTLAND COMMUNITY HEALTH
